title: Ubiquiti UACC-DAC-SFP28-1M, DAC cable, 25 Gbps, 1m
category: Ubiquiti / Optical networks / DAC and AOC cables / DAC cables
description: Passive DAC cable is used for direct connection of two SFP28 ports with line speed 25 Gbps . This cable is 1 m but is also available in other variants. The cable is ideal for creating short connections between switches or routers that provide 25 Gbps throughout your network
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP, SFP+, SFP28 Transmission speed 1 Gbps, 10 Gbps, 25 Gbps AOC/DAC cable type Passive
